name: get-note
title: GetNote
description: Search, save, and manage GetNote notes with Raycast AI
author: fangbaiyu

commands.name: save-link
commands.title: Save Link
commands.subtitle: GetNote
commands.description: Save a link note to GetNote

commands.name: save-text-note
commands.title: Save Text Note
commands.subtitle: GetNote
commands.description: Save a text note to GetNote

tools.name: get-total-note-count
tools.title: Get Total GetNote Note Count
tools.description: Return the total number of notes across the user's entire GetNote account. Use this for questions like 'How many notes do I have?' or 'What is my total note count?'. Do not use this for knowledge-base-specific counts.

tools.name: search-notes
tools.title: Search GetNote Notes
tools.description: Search GetNote with semantic recall. Use this when the user wants to find notes by topic, concept, or a remembered fragment.

query.description: The query or semantic description to search for in GetNote.

topK.description: How many results to return. Default 5, maximum 10.

tools.name: get-note-detail
tools.title: Get GetNote Note Detail
tools.description: Fetch the full detail of a specific GetNote note, including summary, tags, metadata, and the source URL for link notes.

tools.name: save-link-note
tools.title: Save Link to GetNote
tools.description: Save a link note to GetNote, wait for the async task to finish, and return the generated note summary.

url.description: The public URL to save into GetNote.

tools.name: save-text-note
tools.title: Save Text Note to GetNote
tools.description: Create a plain text note in GetNote. Use this for quick capture, memos, or turning a chat answer into a note.

tags.description: Optional tags to add to the note.

tools.name: list-knowledge-bases
tools.title: List GetNote Knowledge Bases
tools.description: List the user's GetNote knowledge bases with their topic IDs and per-knowledge-base note counts. Use this only when the user explicitly asks about knowledge bases, topics, or the contents or count of a specific knowledge base. Do not use this for the overall note count across the whole account.

tools.name: create-knowledge-base
tools.title: Create GetNote Knowledge Base
tools.description: Create a new GetNote knowledge base.

name.description: The name of the new knowledge base.

description.description: Optional description of the knowledge base.

cover.description: Optional cover URL of the knowledge base.

tools.name: list-knowledge-base-notes
tools.title: List GetNote Knowledge Base Notes
tools.description: List notes inside a specific GetNote knowledge base.

tools.name: search-knowledge-base-notes
tools.title: Search GetNote Knowledge Base Notes
tools.description: Run semantic search within a specific GetNote knowledge base.

query.description: The semantic query to search for within the knowledge base.

topK.description: How many results to return. Default 5, maximum 10.

tools.name: add-note-to-knowledge-base
tools.title: Add Note to GetNote Knowledge Base
tools.description: Add one or more GetNote notes to one of the user's own knowledge bases. Use list-knowledge-bases first to find the right topicId.

noteIds.description: One or more GetNote note IDs to add.

tools.name: add-tags
tools.title: Add Tags to GetNote Note
tools.description: Add manual tags to a specific GetNote note.

tags.description: Tags to add to the note.

tools.name: delete-tag
tools.title: Delete GetNote Note Tag
tools.description: Delete a specific tag from a GetNote note. Use get-note-detail first to find the tag ID if needed.

tools.name: delete-note
tools.title: Delete GetNote Note
tools.description: Move a specific GetNote note to trash. Use this when the user explicitly asks to delete, remove, or trash a note.

noteId.description: The GetNote note ID to move to trash.

evals.input: @get-note how many notes do I have
@get-note find my notes about product optimization

results.title: Payment Flow Optimization
results.content: Add a progress bar to reduce anxiety during waiting.

evals.input: @get-note save this idea: shorten onboarding to three steps
@get-note create a knowledge base called Product Research
@get-note list notes in knowledge base topic_123

preferences.name: manualApiKey
preferences.title: Manual API Key
preferences.description: Optional. Use a GetNote API key directly instead of the stored local session.

preferences.name: manualClientId
preferences.title: Manual Client ID
preferences.description: Optional. Defaults to the pre-registered GetNote client ID if omitted.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you intended to publish to npm, remove the prepublishOnly script and run npm publish again.
If you wanted to publish to the Raycast Store instead, use npm run publish.

" && exit 1
